MEDICAL DIAGNOSTIC REPORT
Patient Name: Rahul Kumar
Patient ID: P-2026-4581
Date of Examination: 12 June 2026
Hospital: City Care Medical Center
Chief Complaint
The patient reported fatigue, mild fever, and headache for the past three days.
Vital Signs
• Blood Pressure: 120/80 mmHg
• Heart Rate: 78 bpm
• Temperature: 99.1°F
• Oxygen Saturation: 98%
Laboratory Results
Complete Blood Count (CBC)
• Hemoglobin: 14.2 g/dL
• White Blood Cells: 7,800 cells/µL
• Platelets: 250,000 cells/µL
Blood Glucose
• Fasting Glucose: 92 mg/dL
Assessment
Laboratory findings are within normal limits. No significant abnormalities detected.
Recommendations
• Maintain adequate hydration
• Continue balanced diet
• Monitor symptoms for 48 hours
• Follow-up consultation if symptoms persist
Physician
Dr. Amit Verma Internal Medicine Specialist
Report Status: Final
